subject: Unable to access EHR from home - VPN connection timeout
description: Getting a VPN timeout error when trying to connect to the EHR from home. Worked fine last week. Error code: VPNTMOUT-443.

subject: Requesting standing desk for Occupational Therapy support room 3
description: Submitting a facilities request for a height-adjustable standing desk in support room 3. The current desk makes upper extremity splinting awkward.

subject: DocuSign signature not processing for fieldwork agreement
description: The Occupational Therapy fieldwork educator agreement sent to a Level II student is stuck in 'sent' status for 3 days. Student confirms they signed it. Need IT to check DocuSign integration status.

subject: CEU reimbursement form submission for Bozeman Hand Therapy Intensive
description: Submitting the pre-approval CEU reimbursement form for the Bozeman Hand Therapy Intensive (Nov 14-16, 2026). Registration total: $425. Receipts attached.

subject: remote coaching platform - camera not detected on clinic laptop
description: The remote coaching video platform fails to detect the built-in webcam on the clinic laptop (Asset #BRC-LT-042). External webcam works fine. Tried reinstalling drivers - no change.

subject: Group therapy room scheduling conflict - recurring Friday slot
description: The 2pm Friday group therapy room in Wing B is double-booked recurring through July. Need scheduling admin to resolve - the weekly community wellness circle program runs in that slot.

subject: Requesting splinting supply order - Orfit Classic 3.2mm sheets
description: Submitting a supply request for 10 sheets of Orfit Classic 3.2mm thermoplastic splinting material (product code OC-32-25x18). Current stock is critically low - down to 2 sheets.

subject: New staff access request - Occupational Therapy student fieldwork supervisor portal
description: Requesting fieldwork supervisor portal access for Level II fieldwork management. Student start date is June 1. Need account provisioned before then.

subject: Ergonomic keyboard request for documentation workstation
description: Requesting an ergonomic split keyboard for the primary documentation workstation. Current keyboard is contributing to wrist discomfort after extended charting sessions.

subject: EHR documentation template request - chronic pain group Occupational Therapy evaluation
description: Requesting a standardized chronic pain group Occupational Therapy evaluation template in the EHR. Currently using a generic MSK eval template which doesn't capture pain science education or pacing intervention fields.

subject: Portable ultrasound cart battery replacement
description: The portable ultrasound cart battery (Asset #BRC-US-07) no longer holds a charge - fully drains within 45 minutes. Needs battery replacement or unit swap.

subject: Password reset - staff scheduling portal
description: Account locked out of the staff scheduling portal after failed login attempts. Need IT to reset the password for b.rivers@bitterrootrehab.com.

subject: Occupational Therapy license renewal CEU documentation - upload request
description: Uploading CEU completion certificates for Occupational Therapy license renewal (due Aug 2026). Certificates from MTOTA Spring Symposium, Pain Science webinar series, and MCWC Chronic Pain Program advisory sessions.

subject: Finthesiss.ai community partner portal - single sign-on setup request
description: Requesting IT to configure SSO between the Bitterroot Rehab identity provider and the MTOTA occupational therapist portal. Currently requires separate login credentials.

subject: Printer jam in Occupational Therapy documentation office - recurring issue
description: The Brother MFC printer in the Occupational Therapy documentation office (Asset #BRC-PR-03) is jamming repeatedly on the rear feed tray. Has jammed 4 times this week.

subject: Requesting two external monitors for documentation workstation upgrade
description: Requesting dual external monitors for the main Occupational Therapy documentation workstation. Current single-monitor setup makes dual-screen EHR and paging very inefficient for charting.

subject: Wifi dead zone in Wing C therapy rooms
description: Wifi signal drops completely in Wing C therapy rooms (C-04 through C-07). Prevents remote coaching and EHR use from tablets during support sessions.

subject: DocuSign envelope template - Occupational Therapy CEU reimbursement form
description: Requesting IT to build a DocuSign envelope template for the Occupational Therapy CEU reimbursement form. Currently it's a pacingplaner form that gets scanned - a signed digital form would streamline HR processing.

subject: New hire IT setup - Occupational Therapy student fieldwork placement
description: Requesting IT onboarding for Level II fieldwork student starting June 1. Needs EHR read-only access, Dropbox access, staff email (fieldwork student account), and privacy training enrollment.

subject: Scheduled maintenance - EHR downtime window notification
description: IT notice: EHR scheduled maintenance downtime on June 14, 2026 from 11pm-3am MDT. All professional documentation should be completed before 10:45pm. Backup pacingplaner forms available in the nursing station.
